chat.description: How assistant tool use appears in your message history.

compact.title: Compact
compact.subtitle: One-line summary per tool in the transcript.

detailed.title: Detailed
detailed.subtitle: Expandable arguments, results, and previews inline for each tool.

focused.title: Focused
focused.subtitle: One live tool row at a time; important steps stay visible in the transcript.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete all your data?
deleteConfirm.bodyLine1: This permanently removes your wiki, chats, and profile from Braintunnel, plus the search library Braintunnel built from your mail and other sources. You can't undo it.
deleteConfirm.bodyLine2: Your email accounts stay as they are: Braintunnel doesn't change or delete messages at your provider, and you can keep using mail the same way you do today.

settingsConnectionsPage.title: Connections
settingsConnectionsPage.lead: Mailboxes, calendars, and folders wired into Braintunnel. Open a row to change indexing, default send, or remove a connection.

empty.multiTenant: No sources yet. Connect mail or add calendars below.
empty.singleTenant: No sources yet. Connect mail or add calendars.
